ItemGroupDef.Name: ADAE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per adverse event per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: ADEX
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per exposure parameter per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: ADLB
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per parameter per analysis visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: ADVS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per parameter per analysis visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: ADIMG
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per parameter per analysis visit per subject

ItemGroupDef.Name: ADEFF
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per parameter per analysis visit per subject

Description.TranslatedText: Date of First Exposure to Treatment
Date of Last Exposure to Treatment
Reported Term for the Adverse Event
